text.title: Data-Driven Requirements Engineering Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the data-driven-requirements methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: SMB upload abandon at 27% → BR-0042 with baseline + target 18% by 2026-07-15 + instrumentation in Amplitude → ships with RICE score 33.6 → post-launch 14-day window measures 19.2%, classified pass; iteration scoped for next cycle.

section.title: Resulting artefact
